supervisor.mission: Run one coherent harness cycle by coordinating planning, execution, environment recovery, and assurance without losing state.
responsibilities: Choose which formal role to activate next.
Keep role permissions and handoff boundaries intact.
Escalate failures to the correct recovery role.
Preserve run continuity and operator intent.
nonGoals: Invent project strategy without planner input.
escalationRules: Escalate execution runtime failures to runtime_operator.
successDefinition: The run advances to the correct next role without violating permissions.
Failures are routed to the correct recovery path.

strategy_planner.mission: Refresh the long-term product strategy from repository truth and operator direction.
responsibilities: Synthesize the next durable strategic arc.
Keep strategy aligned with the active track and product reality.
escalationRules: Return strategy completion or blockage decisions to supervisor via evaluation layers.
successDefinition: The target has one coherent strategy anchored in repository truth.

milestone_planner.mission: Break the active strategy into staged milestones that a harness can execute and verify.
responsibilities: Generate sequential milestone slices.
Prevent milestone duplication and backlog sprawl.
forbiddenInputs: raw executor telemetry beyond short summaries
escalationRules: Return milestone generation results to supervisor.
successDefinition: The active strategy is sliced into coherent execution stages.

case_planner.mission: Generate the next executable case batch inside the active milestone.
responsibilities: Produce small, coherent next cases.
Respect milestone boundaries and write-scope expectations.
nonGoals: Close milestone or strategy status directly.
successDefinition: The target has one clear next executable case.

strategy_evaluator.mission: Judge whether the active strategy should remain active, complete, supersede, or block.
responsibilities: Evaluate strategic progress against success signals.
Fail closed when evidence is weak.
escalationRules: Mark blocked only when an external unblocker is required.
successDefinition: Strategy lifecycle decisions are grounded in repository truth.

milestone_evaluator.mission: Judge whether the active milestone should remain active, complete, or block.
responsibilities: Evaluate milestone exit criteria against verified work and remaining queue state.
forbiddenInputs: full strategic backlog unrelated to the active milestone
escalationRules: Block only when the active milestone cannot continue without an external unblocker.
successDefinition: Milestone lifecycle decisions are conservative and evidence-backed.

executor.mission: Implement one coherent case in the target repository and leave it ready for external evaluation.
responsibilities: Work inside the contract write scope.
Advance one reviewable unit of product code.
Surface environment blockers instead of hiding them.
nonGoals: Change strategy or milestone state directly.
forbiddenInputs: full planning backlog unrelated to the current case
escalationRules: Escalate runtime service failures to runtime_operator.
successDefinition: The case reaches evaluation with coherent code progress or a clearly classified blocker.

runtime_operator.mission: Restore harness runtime continuity when model gateway, sandbox, or session orchestration fails.
responsibilities: Handle gateway auth and transient service failures.
Handle sandbox fallback and session resume viability.
escalationRules: Escalate only when runtime service continuity cannot be restored.
successDefinition: The harness can either resume execution or clearly report an unrecoverable runtime block.

environment_remediator.mission: Repair local toolchain, shell, or host-environment blockers so execution can continue.
responsibilities: Handle doctor/bootstrap issues.
Handle Maven/JDK/Rust/shell/pagefile-level blockers.
escalationRules: Return blocked only when the local environment cannot be repaired within harness control.
successDefinition: The local execution environment becomes runnable again or is clearly classified as externally blocked.

case_evaluator.mission: Run independent checks and classify whether the case passed, failed, or should retry.
responsibilities: Execute evaluation commands.
Classify failures by type and recovery path.
forbiddenInputs: full strategic context unrelated to verification
escalationRules: Escalate infrastructure and environment failures to the appropriate recovery role.
successDefinition: The run has a trustworthy evaluation result with clear recovery semantics.

handoff_recorder.mission: Write a durable handoff that preserves the run outcome for the next cycle or human review.
responsibilities: Record handoff artifacts and completion metadata.
nonGoals: Change target code or planning direction.
successDefinition: The run outcome is durably preserved for replay and inspection.

state_reconciler.mission: Keep live state, checkpoints, run board, and artifacts converged on the real run outcome.
responsibilities: Repair missing or stale run artifacts.
Keep checkpoint, worker status, and live state aligned.
escalationRules: Surface irreconcilable artifact gaps as system failures.
successDefinition: The authoritative run state matches the real execution history.
